_comment: Hand-maintained block. gen-manifest.js merges this into docs/p5.gysin.manifest.json. Mechanical fields such as version, commit, shape methods, exports, and examples are derived.

added_apis.name: GysinPlot
added_apis.note: Main class for vector capture, sampling, humanized traces, addressing, and export.

added_apis.name: GysinText.permute
added_apis.note: Dependency-free seeded word permutations that can run alone or feed lines into text() and textCutup().
